name: attributes
description: The container for all metadata attributes associated with the DOI.

fields.name: alternateIdentifiers
fields.description: An identifier or identifiers other than the primary Identifier (DOI) applied to the resource being registered (e.g., ISSN, ISBN).

fields.name: alternateIdentifier
fields.description: The value of the AlternateIdentifier.

fields.name: alternateIdentifierType
fields.description: The type of the AlternateIdentifier (e.g., ISBN, ISSN, ARK).

fields.name: citationCount
fields.description: The number of citations for this resource as tracked by DataCite Event Data.

fields.name: citationsOverTime
fields.description: A breakdown of citation counts grouped by year.

fields.name: total
fields.description: The total number of citations for the specific year.

fields.name: year
fields.description: The year of the citation count.

fields.name: container
fields.description: Descriptive information about the container (e.g., journal, book) if the resource is part of a larger work.

fields.name: firstPage
fields.description: The first page of the resource within the container.

fields.name: identifier
fields.description: The unique identifier for the container (e.g., the ISSN of the journal).

fields.name: identifierType
fields.description: The type of identifier used for the container (e.g., ISSN, ISBN).

fields.name: issue
fields.description: The issue number of the container.

fields.name: lastPage
fields.description: The last page of the resource within the container.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the container (e.g., Journal Name).

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the container (e.g., Journal, Series).

fields.name: volume
fields.description: The volume number of the container.

fields.name: contentUrl
fields.description: The direct URL to the content file (if different from the landing page URL).

fields.name: contributors
fields.description: The institution or person responsible for collecting, managing, distributing, or otherwise contributing to the development of the resource.

fields.name: affiliation
fields.description: The organizational or institutional affiliation of the contributor.

fields.name: affiliationIdentifier
fields.description: The unique identifier of the affiliation (e.g., ROR ID).

fields.name: affiliationIdentifierScheme
fields.description: The name of the scheme used for the affiliation identifier (e.g., ROR).

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the affiliation.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the affiliation identifier scheme.

fields.name: contributorType
fields.description: The type of contributor (e.g., ContactPerson, DataCollector).

fields.name: familyName
fields.description: The surname or family name of the contributor.

fields.name: givenName
fields.description: The personal or first name of the contributor.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: The language of the contributor's name.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The full name of the contributor.

fields.name: nameIdentifiers
fields.description: Uniquely identifies an individual or legal entity, according to various schemes (e.g., ORCID).

fields.name: nameIdentifier
fields.description: The value of the name identifier.

fields.name: nameIdentifierScheme
fields.description: The name of the name identifier scheme.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the name identifier scheme.

fields.name: nameType
fields.description: The type of name (Personal or Organizational).

fields.name: created
fields.description: The date and time the DOI was first created in the DataCite system.

fields.name: creators
fields.description: The main researchers involved in producing the data, or the authors of the publication, in priority order.

fields.name: affiliation
fields.description: The organizational or institutional affiliation of the creator.

fields.name: affiliationIdentifier
fields.description: The unique identifier of the affiliation (e.g., ROR ID).

fields.name: affiliationIdentifierScheme
fields.description: The name of the scheme used for the affiliation identifier.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the affiliation.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the affiliation identifier scheme.

fields.name: familyName
fields.description: The surname or family name of the creator.

fields.name: givenName
fields.description: The personal or first name of the creator.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: The language of the creator's name.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The full name of the creator.

fields.name: nameIdentifiers
fields.description: Uniquely identifies the creator (e.g., ORCID).

fields.name: nameIdentifier
fields.description: The value of the name identifier.

fields.name: nameIdentifierScheme
fields.description: The name of the name identifier scheme.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the name identifier scheme.

fields.name: nameType
fields.description: The type of name (Personal or Organizational).

fields.name: dates
fields.description: Different dates relevant to the work (e.g., Accepted, Available, Copyrighted).

fields.name: date
fields.description: The date value (YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: dateInformation
fields.description: Specific information about the date (e.g., "published in print").

fields.name: dateType
fields.description: The type of date (e.g., Issued, Created, Updated).

fields.name: descriptions
fields.description: All additional information that does not fit in any of the other categories (e.g., Abstract, Methods).

fields.name: description
fields.description: The content of the description.

fields.name: descriptionType
fields.description: The type of description (e.g., Abstract, Methods, SeriesInformation).

fields.name: lang
fields.description: The language of the description.

fields.name: doi
fields.description: The Digital Object Identifier registered for the resource.

fields.name: downloadCount
fields.description: The total number of downloads for this resource.

fields.name: downloadsOverTime
fields.description: A breakdown of download counts grouped by month/year.

fields.name: total
fields.description: The total number of downloads for the specific time period.

fields.name: yearMonth
fields.description: The year and month of the download count (YYYY-MM).

fields.name: formats
fields.description: Technical format of the resource (e.g., file extension or MIME type).

fields.name: fundingReferences
fields.description: Information about financial support (funding) for the resource being registered.

fields.name: awardNumber
fields.description: The code assigned by the funder to the grant or award.

fields.name: awardTitle
fields.description: The human-readable title of the award.

fields.name: awardUri
fields.description: The URI leading to a page with more information about the award.

fields.name: funderIdentifier
fields.description: Uniquely identifies the funding entity (e.g., a Crossref Funder ID).

fields.name: funderIdentifierType
fields.description: The type of funder identifier used.

fields.name: funderName
fields.description: The name of the funding provider.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the funder identifier scheme.

fields.name: geoLocations
fields.description: Spatial region or named place where the data was gathered or about which the data is focused.

fields.name: geoLocationBox
fields.description: A rectangular bounding box definition.

fields.name: eastBoundLongitude
fields.description: The easternmost longitude of the box.

fields.name: northBoundLatitude
fields.description: The northernmost latitude of the box.

fields.name: southBoundLatitude
fields.description: The southernmost latitude of the box.

fields.name: westBoundLongitude
fields.description: The westernmost longitude of the box.

fields.name: geoLocationPlace
fields.description: A description of a geographic location (e.g., city name).

fields.name: geoLocationPoint
fields.description: A specific point location defined by latitude and longitude.

fields.name: pointLatitude
fields.description: The latitude of the point.

fields.name: pointLongitude
fields.description: The longitude of the point.

fields.name: geoLocationPolygon
fields.description: A drawn polygon area defined by a set of points.

fields.name: polygonPoint
fields.description: A point within the polygon.

fields.name: pointLatitude
fields.description: The latitude of the polygon point.

fields.name: pointLongitude
fields.description: The longitude of the polygon point.

fields.name: identifiers
fields.description: A list of identifiers associated with the resource (API field).

fields.name: identifier
fields.description: The value of the identifier.

fields.name: identifierType
fields.description: The type of the identifier.

fields.name: isActive
fields.description: Indicates if the DOI is currently in an active state (Findable).

fields.name: language
fields.description: The primary language of the resource (RFC 5646 codes).

fields.name: metadataVersion
fields.description: The version of the metadata record in the DataCite system.

fields.name: partCount
fields.description: The number of parts associated with this resource.

fields.name: partOfCount
fields.description: The number of collections this resource is a part of.

fields.name: prefix
fields.description: The DOI prefix (e.g., 10.1234) indicating the allocating member.

fields.name: publicationYear
fields.description: The year when the data was or will be made publicly available.

fields.name: published
fields.description: The publication year or date (API display field).

fields.name: publisher
fields.description: The entity that holds, archives, publishes, prints, distributes, releases, issues, or produces the resource. This property is used to formulate the citation.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: The language of the publisher name.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the publisher.

fields.name: publisherIdentifier
fields.description: The unique identifier for the publisher (e.g., ROR).

fields.name: publisherIdentifierScheme
fields.description: The name of the scheme used for the publisher identifier.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the publisher identifier scheme.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: The reason for a state change (e.g., why a DOI was hidden).

fields.name: referenceCount
fields.description: The number of references cited by this resource.

fields.name: registered
fields.description: The timestamp when the DOI was registered.

fields.name: relatedIdentifiers
fields.description: Identifiers of related resources. These must be globally unique identifiers.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The related identifier string.

fields.name: relatedIdentifier
fields.description: The value of the related identifier.

fields.name: relatedIdentifierType
fields.description: The type of the related identifier (e.g., DOI, URL).

fields.name: relatedMetadataScheme
fields.description: The name of the scheme if the identifier is a metadata scheme.

fields.name: relationType
fields.description: The relationship type (e.g., Cites, IsCitedBy, IsPartOf).

fields.name: resourceTypeGeneral
fields.description: The general type of the related resource.

fields.name: schemeType
fields.description: The type of the related metadata scheme.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the related metadata scheme.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title of the related resource (optional).

fields.name: type
fields.description: The resource type of the related resource.

fields.name: relatedItems
fields.description: Information about a resource related to the one being registered (e.g. a journal, book, or series).

fields.name: contributors
fields.description: Contributors to the related item.

fields.name: contributorType
fields.description: The type of contributor to the related item.

fields.name: familyName
fields.description: The family name of the contributor.

fields.name: givenName
fields.description: The given name of the contributor.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The full name of the contributor.

fields.name: nameType
fields.description: The type of name.

fields.name: creators
fields.description: Creators of the related item.

fields.name: familyName
fields.description: The family name of the creator.

fields.name: givenName
fields.description: The given name of the creator.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The full name of the creator.

fields.name: nameType
fields.description: The type of name.

fields.name: edition
fields.description: The edition of the related item.

fields.name: firstPage
fields.description: The first page of the related item.

fields.name: issue
fields.description: The issue number of the related item.

fields.name: lastPage
fields.description: The last page of the related item.

fields.name: number
fields.description: The number of the related item.

fields.name: numberType
fields.description: The type of number (e.g., article number).

fields.name: publicationYear
fields.description: The publication year of the related item.

fields.name: publisher
fields.description: The publisher of the related item.

fields.name: relatedItemIdentifier
fields.description: The identifier for the related item.

fields.name: relatedItemIdentifier
fields.description: The identifier value.

fields.name: relatedItemIdentifierType
fields.description: The type of identifier (e.g., DOI, ISSN).

fields.name: relatedItemType
fields.description: The general type of the related item (e.g., JournalArticle).

fields.name: relationType
fields.description: Description of the relationship of the resource to the related item (e.g., IsPublishedIn).

fields.name: titles
fields.description: The titles of the related item.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: The language of the title.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title text.

fields.name: titleType
fields.description: The type of title (e.g., TranslatedTitle).

fields.name: volume
fields.description: The volume of the related item.

fields.name: rightsList
fields.description: Rights information for this resource (e.g., license or usage rights).

fields.name: lang
fields.description: The language of the rights text.

fields.name: rights
fields.description: The text stating the rights (e.g., "CC-BY 4.0").

fields.name: rightsIdentifier
fields.description: A short identifier for the rights (e.g., "cc-by-4.0").

fields.name: rightsIdentifierScheme
fields.description: The name of the scheme for the rights identifier (e.g., SPDX).

fields.name: rightsUri
fields.description: The URI of the license/rights statement.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the rights identifier scheme.

fields.name: schemaVersion
fields.description: The version of the DataCite Metadata Schema used (e.g., "http://datacite.org/schema/kernel-4").

fields.name: sizes
fields.description: Unstructured size information about the resource (e.g., "15 pages", "6 MB").

fields.name: source
fields.description: The source of the metadata (API field).

fields.name: state
fields.description: The current state of the DOI (Draft, Registered, or Findable).

fields.name: subjects
fields.description: Subject, keyword, classification code, or key phrase describing the resource.

fields.name: classificationCode
fields.description: A subject classification code.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: The language of the subject.

fields.name: schemeUri
fields.description: The URI of the subject scheme.

fields.name: subject
fields.description: The subject or keyword text.

fields.name: subjectScheme
fields.description: The name of the subject scheme/classification.

fields.name: valueUri
fields.description: The URI of the specific subject value.

fields.name: suffix
fields.description: The suffix part of the DOI (the unique string after the slash).

fields.name: titles
fields.description: A name or title by which the resource is known.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: The language of the title.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The title text.

fields.name: titleType
fields.description: The type of title (e.g., AlternativeTitle, Subtitle, TranslatedTitle).

fields.name: types
fields.description: A container for resource type information and export formats.

fields.name: bibtex
fields.description: The metadata formatted in BibTeX for citation.

fields.name: citeproc
fields.description: The metadata formatted in CiteProc JSON for citation.

fields.name: resourceType
fields.description: A description of the resource (free-text).

fields.name: resourceTypeGeneral
fields.description: The general resource type from the controlled list (e.g., Dataset, Software, Image).

fields.name: ris
fields.description: The metadata formatted in RIS for reference managers.

fields.name: schemaOrg
fields.description: The metadata formatted as Schema.org JSON-LD.

fields.name: updated
fields.description: The timestamp when the metadata was last updated.

fields.name: url
fields.description: The URL the DOI resolves to (the landing page).

fields.name: version
fields.description: The version number of the resource.

fields.name: versionCount
fields.description: The number of versions associated with this resource.

fields.name: versionOfCount
fields.description: The number of resources this resource is a version of.

fields.name: viewCount
fields.description: The number of views for this resource landing page.

fields.name: viewsOverTime
fields.description: A breakdown of view counts grouped by month/year.

fields.name: total
fields.description: The total number of views for the specific period.

fields.name: yearMonth
fields.description: The year and month of the view count.

name: id
description: The DataCite DOI (Digital Object Identifier) string.

name: relationships
description: A container for relationships to other API entities (JSON API spec).

fields.name: citations
fields.description: Relationship to resources that cite this DOI.

fields.name: data
fields.description: The array of relationship objects.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The ID of the citing resource.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity (e.g., "dois").

fields.name: client
fields.description: Relationship to the DataCite Client (Repository) account that manages this DOI.

fields.name: data
fields.description: The relationship object.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Client ID (account ID).

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity ("clients").

fields.name: media
fields.description: Relationship to media objects (e.g., text/plain).

fields.name: data
fields.description: The array of media relationship objects.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Media ID.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity ("media").

fields.name: partOf
fields.description: Relationship to resources that this DOI is a part of (e.g., a collection).

fields.name: data
fields.description: The array of relationship objects.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The ID of the parent resource.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity ("dois").

fields.name: parts
fields.description: Relationship to resources that are parts of this DOI.

fields.name: data
fields.description: The array of relationship objects.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The ID of the child resource.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity ("dois").

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Relationship to the DataCite Provider (Member) responsible for the Client.

fields.name: data
fields.description: The relationship object.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The Provider ID.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity ("providers").

fields.name: references
fields.description: Relationship to resources referenced by this DOI.

fields.name: data
fields.description: The array of relationship objects.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The ID of the referenced resource.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity ("dois").

fields.name: versionOf
fields.description: Relationship to the resource this DOI is a version of.

fields.name: data
fields.description: The array of relationship objects.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The ID of the parent version.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity ("dois").

fields.name: versions
fields.description: Relationship to other versions of this resource.

fields.name: data
fields.description: The array of relationship objects.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The ID of the version.

fields.name: type
fields.description: The type of the entity ("dois").
